mapper.select: SELECT aa.id AS answer_id, aa.session_id, aa.item_id, aa.question_no, aa.phase_type, aa.selected_option_id, aa.answer_status, aa.is_correct, aa.response_time_ms, aa.difficulty_before, aa.difficulty_after, aa.created_at, ai.question_type, ai.ability_type, ai.word_text, ai.difficulty_score AS item_difficulty_score, ai.is_anchor AS item_is_anchor FROM assessment_answer aa INNER JOIN assessment_item ai ON aa.item_id = ai.id WHERE aa.session_id = #{sessionId} ORDER BY aa.question_no ASC, aa.id ASC
